close_reason: Implemented do_http_scan: Req+Floki HTTP tier tried before browser for generic/agency sources, browser fallback on no-http_selectors/non-200/0-rows. Validated live (OCWD 53 rows, no browser) + regression test (commit 91eb521).
description: In ListingScanner, add an HTTP fetch path tried BEFORE the browser for generic/_other sources: Req.get(listing_url) with a Chrome-ish UA -> Floki extract via configured selectors. Fall back to do_browser_scan when HTTP returns empty/0 rows or is blocked (non-200, WAF, tiny SPA shell). Proven win: OCWD yields 53 complete rows via Req+Floki vs 20 lossy via browser, and needs no agent-browser. Keep browser fallback intact for SaaS/JS sources.
title: Add do_http_scan tier (Req+Floki first, browser fallback)
